code: import axios from"axios";import{api}from"../url";import store from"../Store";import{authConstants}from"../actions/constants";var token=window.localStorage.getItem("token");var axiosInstance=axios.create({baseURL:api,headers:{'Authorization':token}});axiosInstance.interceptors.request.use(function(req){var _store$getState=store.getState(),auth=_store$getState.auth;if(auth.token){req.headers.Authorization=token;}return req;});axiosInstance.interceptors.request.use(function(res){return res;},function(error){console.log(error);var status=error.response.status;if(status===500){localStorage.clear();store.dispatch({type:authConstants.LOGOUT_SUCCESS});}return Promise.reject(error);});export default axiosInstance;
